Patch Set 1:

Adding the test script to the "regression" file does not add it to autotest.  When this patch is passing and landed the sanity-lnet script should be added to one of the test sessions.

parents.subject: LU-12236 lnet: support non-default network namespace

commit.subject: LU-12236 tests: add tests for LNET network namespace
commit.message:
LU-12236 tests: add tests for LNET network namespace

This patch adds tests for LNET for this feature.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/35666
Lustre-commit: b20704d5f63a07c54cfbea331df90e6ca765e79b

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Aurelien Degremont <degremoa@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I2320e5da1beef30be5dcca9529fa838fc9304876
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/36770
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
